description: Pace v11 planner response shape. Extends v10 with three unhappy-path intents: out_of_scope (refuse cleanly), clarify (ask back), confirm_destructive (gate before irreversible actions). Grammar enforces top-level shape + intent enum + payload-is-object; inner payload shapes validated at runtime per intent (see v11 system prompt).

spokenText.description: What TTS reads aloud. Short confirmation for actions; the answer for answer intents; the refusal for out_of_scope; the question for clarify; the confirmation request for confirm_destructive.

intent.description: Top-level decision route. v11 adds the three unhappy-path intents.

payload.description: Intent-specific payload. Shapes documented in v11 system prompt and validated at runtime.

name.description: For intent=action: action name from registry. For intent=confirm_destructive: the destructive action that WOULD run on user confirmation.

args.description: For intent=action / confirm_destructive: action args matching registry schema

calls.description: For intent=action with multiple parallel calls

reason.description: For intent=out_of_scope: short machine-readable why (logged, not spoken)

question.description: For intent=clarify: the clarifying question (usually mirrors spokenText)

topic.description: For intent=clarify: what dimension is ambiguous (recipient, time, target, app, content)

action.description: For intent=confirm_destructive: name of the planned destructive operation

target.description: For intent=confirm_destructive: human-readable description of what will be destroyed
